summary: Frontend-only testing completed for multi-tenant permission system overhaul. All 11 features tested successfully.

issues: Revenue shows 0 FCFA for all operators - expected per main agent note (no operators with revenue in test database)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All role-based UI features verified. Admin landing page is /admin/admin-dashboard. Admin menu correctly hides Analytics Dashboard and Trip Report. Admin Loyalty is read-only. Admin Permissions shows only User Permissions tab. Super Admin has full access to all tabs and CRUD operations. Operators Management shows Owner, Date Joined columns and Edit modal has service type checkboxes.

admin_menu_analytics.test: Admin menu does NOT show Analytics Dashboard
admin_menu_analytics.details: Analytics Dashboard link not visible in Admin sidebar

admin_menu_trip_report.test: Admin menu does NOT show Trip Report
admin_menu_trip_report.details: Trip Report link not visible in Admin sidebar

admin_menu_operators.test: Admin menu DOES show Operators in Admin Config
admin_menu_operators.details: Operators link visible in Admin Config flyout menu

admin_loyalty_readonly_message.test: Admin Loyalty Program Rewards tab shows 'Read-only access' message
admin_loyalty_readonly_message.details: Message 'Read-only access. Only Super Admins can modify rewards.' displayed

admin_loyalty_no_crud_buttons.test: Admin Loyalty Program has no Add/Edit/Delete buttons on rewards
admin_loyalty_no_crud_buttons.details: No Add Reward, Edit, or Delete buttons visible for Admin

admin_permissions_tabs.test: Admin Permissions page shows only 'User Permissions' tab
admin_permissions_tabs.details: Only User Permissions tab visible - no Roles or Matrix tabs

superadmin_permissions_tabs.test: Super Admin Permissions page shows all 3 tabs
superadmin_permissions_tabs.details: Roles (2), User Permissions, and Matrix tabs all visible

superadmin_loyalty_crud.test: Super Admin Loyalty Program shows Add/Edit/Delete buttons
superadmin_loyalty_crud.details: Add Reward button, Edit (pencil) icons, and Delete (trash) icons visible

operators_management_columns.test: Operators Management page shows new columns: Owner, Date Joined
operators_management_columns.details: Owner and Date Joined columns visible in table header

operators_edit_modal_services.test: Operators Management Edit modal includes service types checkboxes
operators_edit_modal_services.details: Edit modal shows 'Assigned Services' section with 8 checkboxes (Hotels, Travel, Car Rental, Restaurants, Events, Cinema, Laundry, Banquet) and Primary Service Type dropdown

mocked_data_note: Some analytics chart data is MOCKED for display purposes as noted by main agent
